Risk Description: failure to discharge planning and listed building conditions
Mitigation: design team and contractor to collate initial pack of information for discharge of conditions

Risk Description: planning conditions impact on budget
Impact: increase project budget
Mitigation: extent of conditions known and to be reviewed and managed

Risk Description: electricity provider works delayed or non conforming
Impact: works to provide new supply are delayed not in accordance with the programme to save having to provide a sub station
Mitigation: orders for the electrical services have been placed by cyc direct

Risk Description: building control sign off delay due to lack of resources
Impact: revisit design to address concerns of building control
Mitigation: continue liaison with the building control officer

Risk Description: impact of boat companies city cruises
Impact: impact delivery site servicing strategy
Mitigation: legal agreements are in place

Risk Description: party wall negotiations construction access
Impact: objection from neighbours potential delay to programme
Mitigation: appoint party wall surveyor and progress discussions with neighbours

Risk Description: failure to secure market interest for restaurant tenant
Impact: restaurant not achieving appropriate tenant and long term revenue projections impact on project cost
Mitigation: early engagement of agent for potential lettings sufficient expressions of interest

Risk Description: increased construction costs
Impact: exchange rate on materials impact of international markets following political decisions
Mitigation: tender prices received and under review risk shall remain prominent where budget costs provisional sums are included

Risk Description: sub contractor insolvency
Impact: impacts main contractor
Mitigation: contractor financial checks and vetting of subcontractors

Risk Description: surveys required to determine ground conditions contamination
Impact: possible need to re visit design deal with contamination on site
Mitigation: gi survey undertaken information obtained contamination results received desk study provided by arup

Risk Description: identification of active movement
Impact: proven to be active remediation impacts cost
Mitigation: ongoing monitoring by arup and monitoring specification included within contract documents

Risk Description: unidentified archaeology
Impact: further evaluation required cost impact
Mitigation: evaluation of site undertaken

Risk Description: additional surveys required
Impact: cost impact
Mitigation: undertake outstanding surveys

Risk Description: unrealistic programme submitted by contractor
Mitigation: market tested

Risk Description: programme delays due to flood levels impacting construction
Impact: works stop cost and programme implications
Mitigation: review historic flood data and issue to contractor contingency plan to be developed

Risk Description: delay to design programme
Impact: client contractor impact cost programme
Mitigation: implementation of irs schedules design deliverables and clear responsibility for design

Risk Description: underpinning piling and crack repairs to be considered
Impact: may resolve existing cracks and movement of the tower but other cracks may appear elsewhere that will require repairing
Mitigation: detailed dilapidations surveys crack monitors

Risk Description: discovering structural unknowns
Impact: costs of additional surveys and remediation works
Mitigation: undertake surveys early to determine unknowns allow suitable contingency for remediation biggest concerns being the tower underpinning and south range

Risk Description: undetected services not identified on surveys and drawings
Impact: programme re design cost impact to address unknown
Mitigation: utilities surveys maps obtained and plotted on sga drawings careful excavation groundworks when on site

Risk Description: river source heat pump license approval by the environment agency refused
Impact: delay in no approval from ea
Mitigation: provisional consent obtained continued dialogue required

Risk Description: sourcing stone for remediation works
Impact: quarry that stone exists from is closed impacts programme and different stone requires further approval from historic england and the planning authority
Mitigation: investigate other quarries which supply the stone liaise with historic england and the planning authority to have an alternative approved

Risk Description: structural damage and the repairs required to the tower
Impact: finding the right solution to undertake the underpinning works
Mitigation: bullivants arup design and vinci temporary works design to be reviewed in detail to mitigate any consequential delay building monitoring systems and locations to be agreed

Risk Description: outstanding defects remaining unresolved
Impact: cyc left with legacy issues and building defects which need resolving impact on tenant occupation satisfaction
Mitigation: ability to resolve within the building contract use of retention

Risk Description: costs exceeds allocated budget non construction costs
Impact: particular risks surrounding consultant fees furniture fit out works etc
Mitigation: review non construction costs prior to contract award and during construction

Risk Description: incorrect estimation design errors and ambiguities
Impact: construction cost overrun
Mitigation: risk sits with cyc except cdp items

Risk Description: availability of specialist labour equipment
Impact: change in specification need to appoint specialists commission bespoke works
Mitigation: dialogue with main contractor supply chain

Risk Description: poor co ordination with design team interfaces contractor design portions
Mitigation: cdp requirements have reduced from initial intent regular meetings to be held with vinci and design team to discuss cdp interfaces

Risk Description: rights of light
Mitigation: title report does not identify any issues

Risk Description: poor contractor performance during construction
Mitigation: contract to be signed to protect client performance bonds to be obtained

Risk Description: unknown south range structures
Impact: risk of discovering old basement causing issues with piling proposals

Risk Description: insufficient design detail from specialist cdp packages
Impact: impacts the sign off planning conditions listed building consents etc in particular pre commencement conditions
Mitigation: regular design reviews and interface management

Risk Description: satisfying ea requirements
Impact: incident occurring which stops the work and action required to resolve the issue ea prohibition
Mitigation: waste management and compliance with the ea to ensure no environmental hazards

Risk Description: delay in design programme due to tenant operator requirements
Impact: operator changes impacting on cost programme
Mitigation: recovery of cost time included within the agreements for lease should late or significant changes be made

Risk Description: design changes including client changes variations eot loss expense claims and unforeseen items
Impact: construction cost overrun
Mitigation: traditional contract risk with cyc secure adequate contingency

Risk Description: weather delays
Impact: delay to programme wind temp rain
Mitigation: contractor to provide impact and allowances via contract

Risk Description: underpinning crack repairs by third parties
Impact: cracks may appear elsewhere remediation costs
Mitigation: detailed dilapidations surveys crack monitors

Risk Description: ground conditions borehole survey depth insufficient
Impact: proposed piling designs impacted by this and require altering time cost impact
Mitigation: additional bore hole surveys indertaken no foundatons obstructions found albeit at relatively shallow depth near tower bullivants arup to review surveys and confirm they are happy with findings vinci to design piling to new structures and confirm site information held is adequate

Risk Description: instability to boundary wall following demolition
Impact: structural works required piers
Mitigation: assessment of wall structure required scope of works to be determined

Risk Description: clashes between the existing building foundations and proposed drainage network no information is available for the existing buildings therefore it has not been possible to co ordinate the height of drainage to pass above under the existing foundation as required
Impact: co ordination of drainage with foundations during construction cost impact
Mitigation: trial holes could be undertaken to better understand the existing foundations drainage has been designed conservatively to allow for a level of contingency in the design if foundations impact drainage runs

Risk Description: potential drainage clash with proposed lift shaft pits
Impact: additional external drainage network
Mitigation: trial hole dug in the location and appears to be clear risk to be reviewed again once demoliton of north annex is complete

Risk Description: billing omissions or inaccuracies in boq
Impact: missing information within the boq resulting in time and cost increases
Mitigation: t t have carried out reviews of the boq

Risk Description: additional works not covered by contract documents arising from opening up works scope and extent of works greater than assumed etc
Impact: cost programme
Mitigation: detailed change management process to be followed

Risk Description: ongoing movement in the south range given the removal of underpinning from the scheme
Impact: underpinning works reinstated resulting in cost and time impact
Mitigation: monitoring during works

Risk Description: design change due to level of development and coordination at the point of tender for items such as north annex chimney retaining walls and stairs and movement joints to existing structures
Impact: impact on cost and programme changes may delay construction activity impact on sequencing resulting in eot claims
Mitigation: coordination to be managed by design team as a priority design changes to retaining concrete wall has been instructed by cyc and should be underway by design team

Risk Description: council chamber cooling to be approved
Impact: revisit of design proposals time and cost
Mitigation: design team to coordinate with planning conservation
